title: [DISCONTINUED] Slow Your Bronze
description: A mod which allows the 'Bronze' mod to be fully compatible with 'Slow Your Roll'.
body:
> Check out '[Tools of Steel](https://modrinth.com/mod/tools-of-steel)', a successor to this mod!

![mod title](https://kckarnige.github.io/res/slowbronze_title.png)

#

This mod allows the '[Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze)' mod to be fully compatible with '[Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll)', this includes recipes changes and tin ore needing iron tools to obtain it.

This mod was originally made as a test to dip my toes into Fabric modding and Minecraft modding as a whole, but I do plan to work on this mod whenever I can as I personally love both the '[Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze)' mod and '[Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll)' and plan to update this mod to be fully compatible with any future versions of both mods.

![crafting example](https://kckarnige.github.io/res/slowbronze_craftExample.png)


#

# Q&A 

### Q: Can I use this in my modpack?
A: Of course! This mod was meant for modpacks!

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?
A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: There's a bug, how can I report it?
A: Submit an issue on GitHub! [Click here to do that](https://github.com/kckarnige/SlowBronze/labels), or check the "links" tab on Modrinth.
